title: digitaria bicornis subsp. lamarckiana
intro: Digitaria bicornis subsp. lamarckiana, also known as a type of grass or Digitaria species, is a plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Digitaria bicornis subsp. lamarckiana include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for skin conditions and wounds.
